raw_consumer_statement:
On XXXX XXXX, i noticed an email saying that my account information was changed. I did not do that, i called citi bank 30 mins after i saw that, told them, i didnt change anything. Asked them to block my account so no one was able to use it. It didnt work, the card was being used right away, someone had it and he was also able to hack my ONLINE ACCESS. Called CITI houndred of times non stop, until you get tired, i spoke with a lot of humans 2-3 hours, they couldnt block a credit card. I tried everything in my power but citi representatives cant think on their own so they cant fix an issue out of their books, this issue was extremely easy to fix, block the card, block the online acces, delete online access, send me new codes/cards to another address as i BEG THEM TO DO LOT OF TIMES. But no, citi reps, cant understand anything, i spoke with them on english, XXXX, went to the BANK AND MADE A REP FROM THE BANK EXPLAIN THE SITUATION 3 TIMES. IT DIDNT WORK, CITI is just a bank that works with pure BOTS that cant solve anything.

Something pretty much similar happened with XXXX XXXX XXXX, another stolen card from my mailbox, they blocked the card and access in 5 minutes, with the FIRST HUMAN I SPOKE OVER THE PHONE. 10 days later they disputed everything and SOLVED THE ISSUE. IT TOOK 15 DAYS TO RESOLVE THE ISSUE.

CITI BANK HAD MY ISSUE FOR 6 MONTHS WITH NO HUMAN ANSWERS. THE ONLY WAY THAT I GOT A HUMAN TO TRY TO FIX IT, WAS WHEN I DID THE CLAIM HERE AND IN XXXX. 

It wasnt hard to solve, it was hard to speak with a real human in CITI. Even on the Banks they told me they couldnt do anything because Credit card was a different department. So only option was over the phone, with people that was ASKING ME FOR THE CREDIT CARD.... THE STOLEN ONE!!!!!!!!!!!!! WHAT HUMAN ASKS YOU TO PROVIDE THE INFORMATION OF THE STOLEN ITEM????????????? HOW???????? HOW IF SOMEONE STEALS YOUR ITEM, YOU WOULD KNOW THE INFORMATION OF THIS ITEM?????????????????? IT TOOK ME MONTHS OF TALKING WITH HUMAN BOTS IN CITI TO GET 1 HUMAN TO FINALLY UNDERSTAND IT AND HE SOMEHOW WAS ABLE TO CLOSE THE ACCOUNT, AFTER 3 MONTHS!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

CITI BANK SHOULD NOT BE A BANK, THEY ARE INCOMPETENT, THEY DONT KNOW HOW TO ANSWER, THEY DONT ACT LIKE HUMANS, THEY DONT HAVE SUPERVISORS AVAILABLE TO ANSWER, THEY A
RE THE WORST PROBLEM SOLVING BOTS I EVER SAW
